Name: Dana French
Summary: Mission-driven intelligence analyst with 5 years of experience leading financial fraud and cybercrime investigations, identifying potential threats and delivering actionable intelligence to public-private sector partners. Proficient in Python, SQL, Git, and Linux, with hands-on expertise in blockchain intelligence, ransomware, money laundering investigations, and large-scale data analysis to visualize and attribute threats. Demonstrated leadership across cross-functional teams, mentoring new specialists, coordinating multi-unit projects, and communicating complex findings through written and verbal briefs to senior executives and diverse stakeholders.
Skills: Python, SQL, Git, Linux, blockchain intelligence, data analysis, geospatial mapping, visualization, open-source research, malware analysis
